disclaimer.prototype:
Prototype notice. This demo shows how a change of address could look in 2027 with the Deutschland-Stack and EUDI Wallet. Data and authority responses are synthetic (marked [MOCK]).

Today (as of May 2026) the registration office (Meldeamt) automatically handles only some of the steps shown: the move-out notification to the previous registration authority (§ 33 BMG), the address update on the national ID card (§ 28 PAuswG), and the regular transmissions to the tax office (Finanzamt), the broadcasting fee service (Beitragsservice) and the military administration (Wehrverwaltung) (§ 36 BMG together with § 11 (4) RBStV / § 39 AO / § 58c SG). Health insurance, banks, insurers, employers and energy providers require the consent of the person concerned (Art. 6 (1) (a) GDPR). Vehicle owners, the family benefits office (Familienkasse) and the immigration authority (Ausländerbehörde) each need a separate active notification — this demo simulates eID-confirmed fast-track processing that is not yet available in production nationwide.
disclaimer.bussgeld_frist_modal: § 17 BMG requires you to register within two weeks of moving in. § 54 (2) no. 1 BMG sets a fine framework of up to 1,000 € for this. In municipal practice, citizens' offices (Bürgerämter) typically impose 10–50 € for late registration; the exact amount is decided by the office on a case-by-case basis. Fines of up to 50,000 € under § 54 (1) BMG apply only to false statements or non-disclosure, not to late filings.

rechtsgrundlage.bmg_17: § 17 BMG: duty to register within two weeks of moving in.
rechtsgrundlage.bmg_33: § 33 BMG: data transfer between registration authorities — the move-out notification is sent automatically, no later than three working days after registration.
rechtsgrundlage.bmg_34: § 34 BMG: data transfer to other public bodies without consent, where necessary for the performance of public tasks.
rechtsgrundlage.bmg_36: § 36 BMG: regular data transfers — recipients and data are defined by special legislation.
rechtsgrundlage.fzv_15: § 15 FZV: vehicle owners must report a change of residence — registration certificate part I (Zulassungsbescheinigung Teil I) must be updated without undue delay.
rechtsgrundlage.aufenthg_18g: § 18g AufenthG: Blue Card EU for skilled foreign workers (since the 2023 reform of the Residence Act, AufenthG).
rechtsgrundlage.aufenthg_87: § 87 AufenthG: data transfer to immigration authorities (Ausländerbehörden) on request, no automatic push.
rechtsgrundlage.pauswg_18: § 18 PAuswG: online ID function — eID as a legally binding declaration of intent.
rechtsgrundlage.pauswg_28: § 28 PAuswG: address update on the national ID card (address sticker issued by the Bundesdruckerei).
rechtsgrundlage.dsgvo_6_1_a: Art. 6 (1) (a) GDPR: consent of the data subject — revocable at any time.
rechtsgrundlage.estg_67_68: §§ 67–68 EStG: child benefit application and the duty to report changes.
rechtsgrundlage.rbstv_11_4: § 11 (4) RBStV: regular transfer of registration data to the broadcasting fee service (Beitragsservice).
rechtsgrundlage.sgb_iv_28a: § 28a SGB IV: DEÜV reports from the employer to the social insurance bodies.

hero.title: Inbox (Posteingang)
hero.subtitle: All letters from public authorities in one place. Understand instead of feeling overwhelmed.
hero.speculative_footer: This demo shows how a unified inbox (Posteingang) for letters from public authorities *could* look in 2027. As of May 2026: the central citizen mailbox (ZBP/BundID) is in production (~3.8 million mailboxes migrated), with two-way communication planned from July 2026; Mein ELSTER has its own inbox with electronic notification (elektronische Bekanntgabe) as the default plan from 01.01.2027. A *unified* inbox does not yet exist in Germany in 2026 — the demo shows what it could look like. Data and letters are synthetic (`[MOCK]`).

was_kann_ich_tun.hint_frist: Within the deadline you can: file an appeal (Einspruch) OR apply for suspension of enforcement (Aussetzung der Vollziehung) OR ignore it (a late-payment surcharge / Säumniszuschlag will accrue).

steuerbescheid.einspruch: File an appeal (Einspruch, within 1 month, § 355 AO)
steuerbescheid.aussetzung: Apply for suspension of enforcement (Aussetzung der Vollziehung, § 361 AO)
steuerbescheid.saeumniszuschlag_info: Note: late-payment surcharges (Säumniszuschläge) accrue from the due date (§ 240 AO, 1 % per month)

krankenkasse-beitrag.widerspruch: File an objection (Widerspruch, within 1 month, § 84 SGG)

ihk-beitrag.abweichende_festsetzung_pruefen: Check application for a deviating assessment (hardship)

standesamt-urkunde.folge_steueridnr: The tax ID (Steuer-IdNr.) is assigned automatically by the Federal Central Tax Office (BZSt)

normtooltip.vwvfg_41_2: § 41 (2) VwVfG: an administrative act (Verwaltungsakt) is deemed served on the 4th day after being posted (post-law modernisation, in force from 01.01.2025).
normtooltip.vwvfg_41_2a: § 41 (2a) VwVfG: when the act is provided via portal with consent, it is deemed served on the day after retrieval.
normtooltip.ao_122: § 122 AO: notification (Bekanntgabe) of the administrative act; for postal mail the 4-day fiction applies (§ 122 (2) AO).
normtooltip.ao_122a: § 122a AO: electronic notification of tax assessments (Steuerbescheide) via Mein ELSTER — deemed served on the 4th day after being made available (para. 4).
normtooltip.vwzg_5: § 5 VwZG: formal electronic delivery; deemed delivered on the 4th day after dispatch (rebuttable).
normtooltip.ao_240: § 240 AO: late-payment surcharge (Säumniszuschlag) — 1 % per month started, on unpaid tax debts, from the due date.
normtooltip.ao_361: § 361 AO: suspension of enforcement (Aussetzung der Vollziehung) may be applied for if there are serious doubts about lawfulness or if enforcement would constitute undue hardship.
normtooltip.ao_355: § 355 AO: appeal deadline (Einspruchsfrist) — 1 month after notification of the tax assessment.
normtooltip.ao_357: § 357 AO: an appeal (Einspruch) must be filed in writing or electronically with the tax office (Finanzamt).
normtooltip.vwgo_70: § 70 VwGO: objection deadline (Widerspruchsfrist) — 1 month after notification of the administrative act.
normtooltip.sgg_84: § 84 SGG: objection in social-court proceedings — 1 month after notification (Bekanntgabe).
normtooltip.owig_67: § 67 OWiG: appeal against a fine notice (Bußgeldbescheid) — 2 weeks after delivery.
normtooltip.rdg_2: § 2 RDG: legal services (Rechtsdienstleistung) are activities in the affairs of others that require legal examination of the individual case.
normtooltip.ao_30: § 30 AO: tax secrecy (Steuergeheimnis) — protection of personal tax data.
normtooltip.ao_87a: § 87a AO: electronic communication with the tax authorities (Finanzbehörden).
normtooltip.bdsg_22: § 22 BDSG: processing of special categories of personal data.
normtooltip.estg_68: § 68 EStG: cooperation duties for child benefit — evidence must be submitted on request.
normtooltip.aufenthg_81_4: § 81 (4) AufenthG: continuance fiction (Fortbestands-Fiktion) — if the renewal is applied for in time, the residence permit (Aufenthaltstitel) is deemed to continue.
normtooltip.ao_110: § 110 AO: reinstatement to the previous status (Wiedereinsetzung) where a deadline is missed without fault.
normtooltip.dsgvo_6: Art. 6 GDPR: legal bases for the processing of personal data.
normtooltip.dsgvo_9: Art. 9 GDPR: special categories of personal data (health, ethnic origin, …).
normtooltip.dsgvo_22: Art. 22 GDPR: right not to be subject to a decision based solely on automated processing.
normtooltip.dsgvo_28: Art. 28 GDPR: processor — contract with the processor.
normtooltip.bgh_smartlaw: BGH I ZR 113/20 (Smartlaw, 2021): a contract generator is not an unlawful legal service — tool character, no client relationship.

disclaimer.opening:
Notice on opening. This app is a reading and explanation layer for letters from public authorities. Opening or marking-as-read a letter card here is **only an in-app reading status** — it is **not** a retrieval within the meaning of § 41 (2a) VwVfG or § 122a AO and triggers **no** legal notification (rechtliche Bekanntgabe).

Legal notification depends on the delivery channel of the **official** authority:
- **Postal mail (Briefpost)** (most common case — health insurance, broadcasting fee service / Beitragsservice, family benefits office / Familienkasse, immigration authority / Ausländerbehörde, citizens' office / Bürgeramt, fines authority / Bußgeldstelle): deemed served on the **fourth day after being posted** (§ 41 (2) VwVfG or § 122 (2) AO since the post-law modernisation act of 01.01.2025).
- **Mein ELSTER** (tax assessments where the tax return was filed electronically): deemed served on the **fourth day after being made available for retrieval** (§ 122a (4) AO). From 01.01.2027 electronic notification will be the default (opt-out); until then a transitional phase with active opt-in applies.
- **Central citizen mailbox (ZBP/BundID) with consent**: deemed served on the **day after retrieval** (§ 41 (2a) VwVfG). If not retrieved within 10 days, no notification takes place.
- **Formal electronic delivery** (e.g. administrative procedures, social court): deemed delivered on the **fourth day after dispatch**, rebuttable on proof of later access (§ 5 (7) VwZG).

Please check your **official mailboxes** and your physical letterbox **regularly**. This app does not replace that.

Note on translation: the German original of this notice is the authoritative version; translations are reading aids only.
disclaimer.no_legal_advice:
This AI explanation is **general information** and a reading aid — **not a legal service** within the meaning of the German Legal Services Act (§ 2 RDG). It does **not** assess your individual case (BGH I ZR 113/20 ‚Smartlaw' line: tool character, no client relationship, no promise of success).

A concrete legal assessment — for example whether an objection has prospects of success, which reasoning would be persuasive, or whether a notice (Bescheid) is lawful — can **only** be given by a person authorised to provide legal services: a lawyer (Rechtsanwält:in, BRAO), a consumer-advice centre (Verbraucherzentrale, UKlaG/§ 8 RDG), a social welfare association (e.g. SoVD, VdK), or the competent chamber of tax advisers. The AI gives **no guarantees of success** and does **not** represent you before public authorities. Suggested replies or deadlines are non-binding; responsibility for every entry and every dispatch is yours.

Note on translation: the German original of this notice is the authoritative version.
disclaimer.mock_data:
All letters, file references (Aktenzeichen), amounts and personal data shown here are **synthetic** and marked with `[MOCK]`. This demo processes **no real letters from authorities** and has **no connection** to Mein ELSTER, the central citizen mailbox (ZBP/BundID), health insurance portals or other official mailboxes. Letter upload is **disabled** in this demo. Please do not paste real letters or personal data into input fields — the demo is not approved for processing sensitive information.

Note on translation: the German original of this notice is the authoritative version.
disclaimer.original_authoritative:
**Only the German original text** of the notice (Bescheid) is legally binding. The AI summary and any translations are reading aids only and may — like all AI-generated text — contain errors or omissions. If in doubt, the wording of the authority prevails. Click ‚Show original text' to read the full wording, and check important details (deadline, amount, file reference) against the original.

Note on translation: the German original is the authoritative version; this English text is a reading aid only.
disclaimer.frist_modal_inline: This deadline was detected automatically from the letter. Please verify the date in the original text.
disclaimer.summary_footer_hint: The summary supplements the original text, it does not replace it. Click the marker symbol [⌖] next to a bullet to see the original wording in the letter.

compose.outbound_speculative: As of 2027 — speculative design. In this demo we simulate request-thread-bound bidirectional communication on the ZBP/BundID model: replies always live in the thread of a specific letter (anchored by file reference / Aktenzeichen), never as an open mailbox. Today (May 2026) the reply channel would differ by authority: Mein ELSTER for the tax office (Finanzamt), the health insurance portal for health insurance funds, a state service portal (Landes-Service-Portal) for citizens' offices and immigration authorities, often still postal mail. Nothing is sent to {behoerde}.

frist_verlaengerung.label: Request a deadline extension
frist_verlaengerung.description: Request to extend the deadline (purely administrative).

nachweis_einreichen.label: Submit evidence
nachweis_einreichen.description: Cover letter for an attached document.

informative_rueckmeldung.label: Informational reply
informative_rueckmeldung.description: Reply to a query from the authority.

termin_antwort.label: Reply to appointment proposal
termin_antwort.description: Confirm, reschedule or cancel a proposed appointment.

rechtsbehelf_einspruch_skelett.label: File an objection (Einspruch)
rechtsbehelf_einspruch_skelett.description: Skeleton letter with the mandatory details — you write the reasoning yourself.

rechtsbehelf_widerspruch_skelett.label: File a formal protest (Widerspruch)
rechtsbehelf_widerspruch_skelett.description: Skeleton letter with the mandatory details — you write the reasoning yourself.

aussetzung_vollziehung_skelett.label: Apply to suspend enforcement (Aussetzung der Vollziehung)
aussetzung_vollziehung_skelett.description: § 361 of the Fiscal Code (Abgabenordnung, AO) — skeleton application; you write the reasoning yourself.

frist_verlaengerung.disclaimer_pre_insertion: This template formulates a plain request for a deadline extension. It contains no legal assessment of your individual case. Whether an extension is granted is decided by the authority under the applicable procedural rules (for example the Fiscal Code, Abgabenordnung, or the Administrative Procedure Act, Verwaltungsverfahrensgesetz). You write the reasoning yourself — the app does not suggest arguments.
frist_verlaengerung.disclaimer_inline: Note: the authority decides on its own whether the deadline is extended.

nachweis_einreichen.disclaimer_pre_insertion: With this template you submit documents to fulfil your duty to cooperate — for example under the Social Code (Sozialgesetzbuch), the Fiscal Code (Abgabenordnung) or the Residence Act (Aufenthaltsgesetz), depending on the authority. The template contains no waiver of further document requests: please attach only the requested evidence.
nachweis_einreichen.disclaimer_inline: Note: only attach the explicitly requested evidence — no additional documents.

informative_rueckmeldung.disclaimer_pre_insertion: This template is a plain factual statement. It is **not** an objection (Einspruch), **not** a formal protest (Widerspruch), **not** an application. If you wish to formally challenge a notice (Bescheid), choose a different template — and deadlines may be running (typically one month after notification; governed by the Fiscal Code, Abgabenordnung, or the Social Court Act, Sozialgerichtsgesetz, among others).
informative_rueckmeldung.disclaimer_inline: Note: this statement is not a legal remedy — it does not pause any deadline.

termin_antwort.disclaimer_pre_insertion: This template replies to an appointment proposal from the authority. If you reschedule or cancel, suggesting an alternative date (mode „verschieben“) is generally helpful. Please note that missing your duty to cooperate in an ongoing procedure can have adverse consequences — for example under the cooperation provisions of the Social Code (Sozialgesetzbuch) or the Residence Act (Aufenthaltsgesetz), depending on the authority.
termin_antwort.disclaimer_inline: Note: cancelling without proposing an alternative can delay the procedure.

freitext.disclaimer_inline: You are writing without a template. Date, file reference (Aktenzeichen) and recipient are pre-filled from the letter.

rechtsbehelf_einspruch_skelett.label: File an objection (Einspruch)
rechtsbehelf_einspruch_skelett.beschreibung: Skeleton letter with the mandatory details — you write the reasoning yourself.
rechtsbehelf_einspruch_skelett.disclaimer_pre_insertion: This template contains only the mandatory details (date, file reference, recipient and the declaration of the legal remedy). **You write the reasoning yourself** — the app does not suggest arguments, because assessing your individual case is a legal service within the meaning of § 2 of the Legal Services Act (Rechtsdienstleistungsgesetz, RDG) and may only be provided by lawyers, registered persons, consumer advice centres (Verbraucherzentralen) or social associations (Sozialverbände).
rechtsbehelf_einspruch_skelett.disclaimer_inline: Note: you write the reasoning yourself — the app does not generate it.

rechtsbehelf_widerspruch_skelett.label: File a formal protest (Widerspruch)
rechtsbehelf_widerspruch_skelett.beschreibung: Skeleton letter with the mandatory details — you write the reasoning yourself.
rechtsbehelf_widerspruch_skelett.disclaimer_pre_insertion: This template contains only the mandatory details (date, file reference, recipient and the declaration of the legal remedy). **You write the reasoning yourself** — the app does not suggest arguments, because assessing your individual case is a legal service within the meaning of § 2 of the Legal Services Act (Rechtsdienstleistungsgesetz, RDG) and may only be provided by lawyers, registered persons, consumer advice centres (Verbraucherzentralen) or social associations (Sozialverbände).
rechtsbehelf_widerspruch_skelett.disclaimer_inline: Note: you write the reasoning yourself — the app does not generate it.
rechtsbehelf_widerspruch_skelett.disclaimer_pre_insertion_zusatz_sgg: For a notice issued by a social-insurance body, the **Widerspruch** (formal protest) is the correct legal remedy — not the Einspruch (§ 84 of the Social Court Act, Sozialgerichtsgesetz, SGG). Note also: contributions remain due despite a Widerspruch (§ 86a (2) no. 1 SGG).
rechtsbehelf_widerspruch_skelett.disclaimer_pre_insertion_zusatz_vwgo: Note: even a Widerspruch has no suspensive effect in contribution matters (§ 80 (2) no. 1 of the Code of Administrative Court Procedure, Verwaltungsgerichtsordnung, VwGO) — the claim remains due despite the protest.

aussetzung_vollziehung_skelett.label: Apply to suspend enforcement (Aussetzung der Vollziehung)
aussetzung_vollziehung_skelett.beschreibung: § 361 of the Fiscal Code (Abgabenordnung, AO) — skeleton application; you write the reasoning yourself.
aussetzung_vollziehung_skelett.disclaimer_pre_insertion: Suspension is **not granted automatically** — the authority reviews each application on its own (§ 361 (2) of the Fiscal Code, Abgabenordnung, AO). Late-payment penalties under § 240 AO continue to accrue as long as the suspension has not been granted. This template assumes that you have already filed an objection (Einspruch) or are filing one at the same time.
aussetzung_vollziehung_skelett.disclaimer_inline: Note: suspension is not granted automatically — late-payment penalties continue to accrue until the authority has decided.

einspruch_ao.title: File the objection with the right authority
einspruch_ao.body: An objection (Einspruch) must be lodged with the authority whose administrative act is being challenged (§ 357 (2) sentence 1 of the Fiscal Code, Abgabenordnung, AO). We have taken „{empfaenger_behoerde}“ from the letterhead as the addressee. Please verify the recipient address yourself — an objection lodged with the wrong body only preserves the deadline if it reaches the competent authority while the deadline is still running (§ 357 (2) sentence 4 AO).

pre_insertion_modal.einspruch_ao_familienkasse_zusatz: Note: Kindergeld (child benefit) decisions are challenged under the rules of the Fiscal Code (Abgabenordnung, AO) — not under the Social Court Act (Sozialgerichtsgesetz). Deadline and form follow from § 357 AO. This is because Kindergeld is a tax benefit within the meaning of § 31 of the Income Tax Act (Einkommensteuergesetz, EStG) (BFH III R 26/22, 2023).

widerspruch_sgg.title: File the formal protest with the right authority
widerspruch_sgg.body: A Widerspruch in a social-insurance matter must be lodged with the body that issued the notice (§ 84 (2) sentence 1 of the Social Court Act, Sozialgerichtsgesetz, SGG). We have taken „{empfaenger_behoerde}“ from the letterhead as the addressee. Please verify the recipient address yourself — lodging with another domestic authority preserves the deadline only because that authority must forward the protest to the competent body without delay (§ 84 (2) sentence 2 SGG).

widerspruch_vwgo.title: File the formal protest with the right authority
widerspruch_vwgo.body: A Widerspruch must be lodged with the authority that issued the contested administrative act (§ 70 (1) sentence 1 of the Code of Administrative Court Procedure, Verwaltungsgerichtsordnung, VwGO). We have taken „{empfaenger_behoerde}“ from the letterhead as the addressee. Please verify the recipient address yourself — in some federal states (such as Bavaria) the formal-protest procedure has been abolished for certain subject areas; in those cases an action must be brought directly before the administrative court (Verwaltungsgericht) instead of a Widerspruch.

aussetzung_ao.title: Suspension of enforcement — important notes
aussetzung_ao.body: Suspension of enforcement (Aussetzung der Vollziehung) must be applied for at the tax authority that issued the contested notice (§ 361 (2) sentence 1 of the Fiscal Code, Abgabenordnung, AO). It is **not granted automatically** — the authority will only grant suspension if there are serious doubts as to the lawfulness of the notice or if enforcement would constitute undue hardship (§ 361 (2) sentence 2 AO). Late-payment penalties under § 240 AO continue to accrue as long as suspension has not been granted; furthermore, suspension presupposes that an objection (Einspruch) has already been filed.

frist_cited_format.einspruch_ao: You have **1 month** from notification of the notice to file an objection — **§ 355 (1) of the Fiscal Code (Abgabenordnung, AO)**. The deadline ends on {frist_datum}.
frist_cited_format.widerspruch_sgg: You have **1 month** from notification of the notice to file a formal protest — **§ 84 (1) of the Social Court Act (Sozialgerichtsgesetz, SGG)**. The deadline ends on {frist_datum}.
frist_cited_format.widerspruch_vwgo: You have **1 month** from notification of the notice to file a formal protest — **§ 70 (1) sentence 1 of the Code of Administrative Court Procedure (Verwaltungsgerichtsordnung, VwGO)**. The deadline ends on {frist_datum}.
frist_cited_format.aussetzung_ao: You can apply for a suspension of enforcement at any time while the objection proceedings are pending — **§ 361 (2) of the Fiscal Code (Abgabenordnung, AO)**. There is no separate deadline, but filing quickly is important because late-payment penalties under § 240 AO continue to accrue.

compose.bekanntgabe_caveat: Note: this notice was made available electronically via Mein ELSTER. The **fourth day** after provision is deemed the date of notification (§ 122a (4) of the Fiscal Code, Abgabenordnung, AO). The deadline therefore ends four days later than for postal notification.
compose.bekanntgabe_caveat_summary: When does the deadline start? Notes on electronic notification
compose.frist_abgelaufen_warnung: According to our data, the deadline stated in the notice expired on {frist_datum}. A late filing is possible but is regularly rejected as inadmissible — unless the legal-remedy instructions in the notice were defective (in which case a one-year deadline applies) or the conditions for restoration of the previous status (Wiedereinsetzung in den vorigen Stand) are met. Please obtain advice from a consumer advice centre (Verbraucherzentrale), a social association (Sozialverband) or a lawyer before filing.
compose.skelett_footer_no_legal_advice: Please have the prospects of success of your legal remedy assessed by a consumer advice centre (Verbraucherzentrale), a social association (Sozialverband) or a lawyer — the app does not provide such an assessment.

skelett_visibility_explainer.kein_rechtsbehelf_bei_mitwirkung: Note: this letter is a request to cooperate, not a formal notice (Bescheid). You cannot (yet) file a legal remedy here — please submit the requested evidence or request an extension of the deadline.

Nationwide connection of the 51 RegMoG registers is on the 2026/2027 roadmap.

Today (May 2026) this convergence has not yet been reached.

vornamen.pointer: Correction at the registry office (Standesamt) under § 45 PStG.

doktorgrad.pointer: Correction via the citizens' office (Bürgeramt) with proof upload (§ 3 (1) no. 6 BMG).

geburtsdatum.pointer: Correction at the registry office (Standesamt) of the place of birth.

geburtsort.pointer: Correction at the registry office (Standesamt) of the place of birth.

geschlecht.pointer: Declaration at the registry office (Standesamt) under § 4 SBGG (registration) and § 2 SBGG (in-person notarisation).

staatsangehoerigkeit.pointer: Correction via the naturalisation authority (Einbürgerungsbehörde) under StAG.

steuer_id.pointer: Issued for life by the Federal Central Tax Office (Bundeszentralamt für Steuern) under § 139b AO — cannot be changed.

anschrift_aktuell.pointer: Citizens' office (Bürgeramt) appointment or electronic registration (eWA) under § 17 BMG.

anschriften_historisch.pointer: Updates are triggered by a new registration under § 17 BMG.

familienstand.pointer: Correction at the registry office (Standesamt) under PStG.

personalausweis.pointer: Reissue at the citizens' office (Bürgeramt) under PAuswG.

reisepass.pointer: Reissue at the citizens' office (Bürgeramt) under PassG.

eat_can.pointer: Correction via the immigration authority (Ausländerbehörde) under AufenthG.

azr_nr.pointer: Correction via the immigration authority (Ausländerbehörde) under § 34 AZRG.

religionszugehoerigkeit.pointer: Joining / leaving: registry office (Standesamt) or religious community; storage under § 3 (1) no. 11 BMG.

auskunftssperre.pointer: Application with reasons at the citizens' office (Bürgeramt) under § 51 (1) BMG.

uebermittlungssperren.pointer: Application at the citizens' office (Bürgeramt) under §§ 42 (3), 50 (5) BMG (no reasons required).

drv_versicherungsnummer.pointer: Update via your DRV pension account (§ 147 SGB VI).

elstam.pointer: Update via Mein ELSTER or the tax office (Finanzamt) under § 39 EStG.

disclaimer.lese_schicht: This app is a **read-only signposting layer**. It does **not** make any changes to your data in the responsible registers itself. Corrections are made exclusively through the relevant authority's procedure — for example, at the citizens' office (Bürgeramt) under § 17 BMG for your address; at the registry office (Standesamt) under PStG for marital status and given names; at the registry office (Standesamt) under § 4 SBGG for the **registration** of a gender-entry change (orally or in writing, three months before the declaration) and under § 2 SBGG for the **in-person notarisation of the declaration** at the registry office; at the Federal Central Tax Office (Bundeszentralamt für Steuern) for the tax identification number (§ 139b AO). For each field we show you the right path.
disclaimer.audit_log_app_internal: The activity log shown here records only your activities within this app (views, filters, self-edits). It is **not** an official authority audit trail. The official audit layer for IDNr-based data transmissions between public bodies is provided by the Privacy Cockpit (Datenschutzcockpit) under § 9 IDNrG with a 24-month retention period — available at datenschutzcockpit.bund.de once the relevant registers are connected. As of May 2026: pilot phase with limited register coverage; the Federal Motor Transport Authority (Kraftfahrt-Bundesamt) joined the IDA procedure on 15 April 2026, with DSC connection to follow. A nationwide connection of all 51 RegMoG registers is on the 2026/2027 roadmap.
disclaimer.eudi_speculative: The function shown here — releasing personal data as a wallet attestation to private recipients (e.g. bank, landlord, energy provider) at the click of a button — simulates a **vision for 2027**. It is based on the EUDI Wallet Regulation (EU) 2024/1183 and the Architecture and Reference Framework (as of May 2026: v2.0). The duty to provide an EUDI Wallet applies in Germany no earlier than 2026/2027; third-party acceptance, trust-service compliance and fee models are not yet finalised in law.
disclaimer.iban_speculative: A central IBAN record with automatic transfer to the family benefits office (Familienkasse), tax office (Finanzamt) and health insurer (Krankenkasse) is **not** available today (May 2026). This demo simulates a 2027 pattern. At present you must file your bank details with each authority separately.
disclaimer.religion_art9: Religious affiliation is a special category of personal data under Art. 9 GDPR. It is shown here only on click. Storage in the registration register is based on § 3 (1) no. 11 BMG; its use for income tax and church tax is based on § 51a EStG together with the church-tax procedure at the Federal Central Tax Office (KiStAM at BZSt).
disclaimer.religion_consent_toggle_label: I expressly consent to my religious affiliation being shown in this app (Art. 9 (2) (a) GDPR). This consent applies only to the current session.
disclaimer.sperren_mock_pattern: In a real system, an information block or transmission block under § 51 BMG (with reasons) or under §§ 42 (3), 50 (5) BMG (without reasons) is recorded only upon application to the responsible registration authority (Meldebehörde). This in-app toggle is a demo pattern and does not replace an official application.
disclaimer.renteninfo_info_only: This app does not calculate pensions. Values come from your pension information (Renteninformation) of {stichtag} (§ 109 para. 3 SGB VI).
disclaimer.pflegegrad_art9: Care level (Pflegegrad) is a health-data category under Art. 9 GDPR and possibly under EuGH 01/08/2022 C-184/20 (broad reading of health data). Legal basis for setting up the care level: § 14 SGB XI; deadline for the Pflegekasse decision: § 18c SGB XI (25 working days).
disclaimer.epa_anlage_widerspruch: Information on ePA setup pursuant to § 343 SGB V; setup is automatic under § 342 para. 1 sentence 2 SGB V since 15/01/2025. You can object to setup via your health insurer.
disclaimer.zfdr_unvollstaendig: The Digital pension overview (rentenuebersicht.de) aggregates over 700 provision institutions with around 137 million entitlements. Professional pension funds (Versorgungswerke), civil-servant pensions (Beamtenversorgung) and direct commitments (Direktzusagen) are not connected today.
disclaimer.pflegegrad_consent_toggle_label: I expressly consent to the display of my care level (Pflegegrad) in this app (Art. 9 para. 2 lit. a GDPR). This consent applies only to the current session.
disclaimer.track_c_empty_state_body: You have no pension information (Renteninformation) because you are not compulsorily insured in the statutory pension scheme (GRV). For private health insurance (PKV) there is no central aggregator like the Digital pension overview (ZfDR) — you have to use your insurer's app. Options: 1) voluntary statutory pension insurance (§ 7 SGB VI), 2) review private provision, 3) if your profession requires compulsory insurance (§ 2 SGB VI), apply for compulsory insurance.
disclaimer.eugh_c184_20_weite_lesart: EuGH C-184/20 (01/08/2022) also covers indirect inferences about health data.

wallet_externe_empfaenger.banner: **2027 vision** — Wallet & external recipients. This section shows how EUDI-Wallet-based data sharing with private recipients (bank, landlord, energy provider) *could* look. Today (May 2026) this function is not available.
wallet_externe_empfaenger.disclaimer_title: Note on the EUDI Wallet 2027 vision (expand/collapse disclaimer)

wallet_externe_empfaenger.arf_footer: Data basis: EUDI Architecture and Reference Framework (as of May 2026: v2.0); PID Rulebook v1.4 — 8 mandatory attributes, 4 of 6 optional attributes.

This demo abstracts to BundID; OZG 2.0 (Onlinezugangsgesetz 2.0) provides for convergence by 24.07.2028.

email.disclaimer_only_for_bundid_attached: This email is used only by authorities connected to BundID — Bürgeramt Friedrichshain-Kreuzberg is piloting it.
email.disclaimer_selbststaendig: Note: ELSTER, your health insurer (Krankenkasse) and the trade-association accident insurer (Berufsgenossenschaft) may hold different contact details — this demo only shows the BundID data.

mobil.disclaimer_self_attested: The mobile number is self-attested. Germany has no authoritative state register of mobile numbers. § 3 BMG (Bundesmeldegesetz) does not include mobile numbers.
mobil.hardlock_only_notification: Usable only for notifications about new inbox messages — never as a binding delivery channel.

postfach.wegweiser_pointer: Activate inside your BundID account at id.bund.de/de/postfach. § 9 (1) sentence 2 OZG (Onlinezugangsgesetz): you may opt out per individual application.

postanschrift.cross_ref_pointer: Your postal address is shown in the Address section. Authoritative source: civil register (Melderegister, § 3 BMG). Correction path: Bürgeramt appointment / online residence registration (eWA, § 17 BMG).

notification.vision_banner: 2027 vision — this feature does not exist in Germany today; OZG 2.0 (Onlinezugangsgesetz 2.0) does not provide for it by 2028 either
notification.save_confirm_body: You have just changed 2027-vision data. In today's reality this changes nothing.

sms_pilot.disclaimer_redaction: SMS notifications contain no social-data content (SGB X §§ 67ff.) — only a pointer that a new message is in your inbox.

option.abh_hardlock_tooltip: The LEA Berlin / ABH Köln (immigration authorities, Ausländerbehörde) are not connected to the BundID inbox in 2026. Decisions under §§ 86, 87 AufenthG (Aufenthaltsgesetz) are still served by postal letter (§ 41 (2) VwVfG, Verwaltungsverfahrensgesetz).
option.kfz_hint: Vehicle authorities (KFZ) are not connected to the BundID inbox in 2026 — postal letter remains the channel today.
option.steuer_hint_elster: Tax decisions are served via the ELSTER inbox (§ 122a (4) AO, Abgabenordnung), not the BundID inbox.

live_counter.savings: You will save approximately {briefe_pro_jahr_gespart} letters per year and {tage_frist_gespart} days of delivery deadline per decision (§ 9 OZG inbox fiction vs. § 41 (2) VwVfG postal-letter fiction).
live_counter.no_savings: This setting saves no letters — it only changes the notification address, not the binding delivery channel. Decisions still arrive by postal letter (§ 41 (2) VwVfG).
